emails.subject: UC-Berkeley Graduate Student
emails.body: Ashley, This is one resume I got today. I think that it makes sense to invite him for an interview directly with my group. He does not qualify as an analyst candidate. What do you think? Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 10/24/2000 04:14 PM Rajnish Kamat <kamat@ieor.berkeley.edu> on 10/23/2000 07:55:31 PM
